description: <b>Style Note</b>  We like Indian apparel from biba. Bright and colourful with traditional details and easy to pair, their kurtas are favourites for those who like an ethnic look. <b>Product Details</b>  Blue printed kurta, has a round neckline, lace detail around the neckline, mirror and embroidery details on the yoke, lace line below the bust, gathers from below the bust and a curved hemline    <b>Material and Care</b>  100% cotton  Wash separately in cold water  Do not bleach  Dry in shade  Use medium to hot iron <b>Size and Fit</b>  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 32 <b>Style Note</b> We like Indian apparel from BIBA.
